name: See's Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the chocolate chips, marshmallow cream, butter, vanilla, and chopped walnuts.
2. Set aside.
3. In a saucepan, boil the remaining ingredients (sugar and evaporated milk) briskly for 9 minutes after coming to a boil, stirring constantly.
4. Add the boiling sugar mixture to the bowl with the chocolate chips and mix well.
5. Pour the mixture into a buttered shallow pan and refrigerate until set.
6. Slice into squares and serve. The fudge will keep in the refrigerator for months when stored properly.
